description:
The RawGraphic component takes in a Material or a Material Property Block component, then shows the raw graphic image onto the UIX.

}}

fields.Material: The material to take the raw graphic from.
fields.PropertyBlock: The image within a literal image block.
fields.FillRect: The filling rect for this image.
fields.Color: Changes the color of the image.
fields.UVRect: Shifts the UV of the raw image.
fields.Orientation: Rotates the raw image and respects aspect ratio.
fields.Normal: The normal for this raw graphic.
fields.Tangent: The tangent for this raw graphic.
fields.HideWithNoMaterial: If there is no material, hid this raw image.
fields.PreserveUVAspectRatio: If this raw graphic should preserve its aspect ratio.
fields.InteractionTarget: Makes this image as the interaction target for this UIX.

usage: Use this component when the Image component does not have what your looking for in your UIX design.
